title: Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
company: Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Bengaluru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners:
Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners!
